title: Growth Manager
location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India / Gurgaon, Haryana, India
role_summary: Drive growth for Google's advertising business by working with clients in a consultative sales and digital marketing capacity, likely focused on the India market.
why_good_fit: Your deep experience driving SMB advertiser conversion at Meta, the 2.3% India revenue uplift from the SMB enforcement project, and your Shoppertainment monetisation work demonstrate a strong track record in digital advertising growth. Your on-ground understanding of Indian SMBs and advertisers — from informal WhatsApp-led businesses to large advertisers — maps well to a Growth Manager role at Google. Your competitive intelligence background (including daily monitoring of Google's own moves) gives you insider-level market awareness.
how_to_win: Lead with your quantified revenue impact story — the 2.3% India revenue uplift and 10M+ businesses impacted at Meta. Frame your experience as understanding the full funnel from user/SMB discovery to advertiser activation. Prepare a perspective on Google's India advertising opportunity vs. Meta's, leveraging your competitive intelligence expertise. Highlight your consultative approach to working with businesses (bakery story as a hook for empathy-led client understanding). Be ready to discuss how AI tools can accelerate growth workflows, given your top 5% AI fluency.
key_requirements: Bachelor's degree, 5+ years in digital advertising/consultative sales/business development/digital marketing, experience in online media environment.
date_published: Unknown — listing active at time of scrape

title: Strategy and Operations Lead, GBO Tools
role_summary: Lead strategy and operations for Google's internal business operations tools, combining management consulting-style strategic thinking with program management and operational execution.
why_good_fit: Your experience building half-plans, opportunity sizing, strategic roadmap inputs, and cross-functional execution partnerships at Meta mirrors the consulting-style strategic thinking this role demands. Your personal AI operating system (80% task automation, top 5% Metamate usage) demonstrates exactly the kind of operational efficiency and tools-thinking this role likely requires. Your work influencing product and policy teams through structured insight writing and pitch decks shows strong strategy-to-execution capability.
how_to_win: Position yourself as a strategy-minded operator who bridges insight and execution — use the SMB enforcement project as your case study (discovery → data analysis → pitch → policy change → product team creation → 2.3% revenue impact). Emphasize your half-planning methodology at Meta as evidence of structured strategic thinking. Highlight your AI OS as proof you think in systems and tools. Be transparent that your background is product strategy rather than traditional management consulting, but frame that as a strength — you bring real product and market context to strategy work.
key_requirements: Bachelor's degree, 6+ years in management consulting, business strategy, corporate advisory, or program management.
date_published: Unknown — listing active at time of scrape
